rationale: Replaced the real-time 280ms sleep in the arrow submit test with a deterministic setTimeout spy that invokes the scheduled arrow-clear callback without waiting.
Moved holdSubmitArrowExitUntilNavigation() to the post-validation submit phase, just before upload/create work begins, so validation branches no longer need to start the held arrow state.
Removed the return from the finally block and changed cleanup to run only when navigation did not succeed.
Addressed the summarized review items: deterministic timer control, later arrow-hold initialization, and no return from finally.
Moved didNavigateAfterCreate assignment after navigateTo() and added regression coverage proving a thrown navigation clears submit busy state.
Automated review wrapper with no additional actionable feedback beyond the inline comments.
